Manufacturing Package for softstart_routed
==================================================

Manufacturer: jlcpcb-tier1
Generated by: kicad-tools 0.13.0
Generated at: 2026-06-16 01:49 UTC

Contents:
---------
  bom_jlcpcb.csv
    BOM (Bill of Materials): Component list for PCB assembly ordering

  cpl_jlcpcb.csv
    CPL (Component Placement List): Pick-and-place coordinates for SMT assembly
    Note: 18 through-hole component(s) are excluded from this file and must be hand-soldered after SMT assembly: D1, F1, J1, J2, J3, J4, J5, Q1A, Q1B, Q2A, Q2B, R6, R20, R21, RV1, SW1, U2, U9

  gerbers.zip
    Gerber files: PCB fabrication data (copper layers, silkscreen, solder mask, drill)

  report.pdf
    Design report: Manufacturing readiness report with DRC/ERC results

  images/ (9 files)
    Report images: Board renders: per-copper-layer, front/back, assembly view, schematic sheets

  kicad_project.zip
    KiCad project archive: Source KiCad project files (.kicad_pcb, .kicad_sch, .kicad_pro)

  manifest.json
    Manifest: SHA256 checksums for all output files
